p5.fab

Setup setPrinter()
Motion moveTo()move()travelTo()moveRetract()moveToX()moveToY()moveToZ()moveToE()moveX()moveY()moveZ()moveE()
Extrusion moveExtrude()extrudeX()extrudeY()extrudeZ()extrudeXY()extrudeToX()extrudeToY()extrudeToZ()extrudeToXY()
Temperature setTemps()setNozzleTemp()setBedTemp()

Resources
Guides p5.fab PrimerIntro to Creative CodingIntro to Digital Fabrication
Tutorials Getting StartedCubeInteractive CubeNon-PlanarLine VaseEtch-a-Sketch

Reference

All methods available on the fab object.

Setup

setPrinter() Configure the fab instance for a specific printer preset, with optional overrides.

Motion

moveTo() Move to an absolute XYZ position without extruding. move() Move relative to the current position without extruding. travelTo() Move to an absolute position with a 2mm z-hop over the travel path. moveRetract() Move to an absolute position with a filament retraction, z-hop, and re-prime. Use this to travel between disconnected extrusion paths without stringing. moveToX() Move to an absolute X position without extruding. moveToY() Move to an absolute Y position without extruding. moveToZ() Move to an absolute Z position without extruding. moveToE() Move the extruder to an absolute E position. moveX() Move a relative distance in X without extruding. moveY() Move a relative distance in Y without extruding. moveZ() Move a relative distance in Z without extruding. moveE() Move the extruder a relative distance in E.

Extrusion

moveExtrude() Move to an absolute XYZ position while extruding filament. Extrusion amount is calculated automatically from the move distance if not provided. extrudeX() Move a relative distance in X while extruding. extrudeY() Move a relative distance in Y while extruding. extrudeZ() Move a relative distance in Z while extruding. extrudeXY() Move a relative distance in X and Y while extruding. extrudeToX() Move to an absolute X position while extruding. extrudeToY() Move to an absolute Y position while extruding. extrudeToZ() Move to an absolute Z position while extruding. extrudeToXY() Move to an absolute XY position while extruding.

Temperature

setTemps() Set nozzle and bed temperatures and wait for both to be reached before continuing. setNozzleTemp() Set the nozzle temperature and wait for it to be reached before continuing. setBedTemp() Set the bed temperature and wait for it to be reached before continuing.

Print control

autoHome() Home all axes and reset the extruder position. introLine() Print a priming line along the left edge of the bed to prepare the extruder. fanOn() Turn the part cooling fan on at full speed. fanOff() Turn the part cooling fan off. pausePrint() Pause the print for a given duration. stopPrint() Immediately stop the print and clear the command queue.

Configuration

setSpeed() Set the feedrate for subsequent moves. setMaxAcceleration() Set the maximum acceleration for each axis. setStartAcceleration() Set the starting acceleration for print moves.

Utilities

makeE() Calculate the extrusion amount needed to move to an absolute XYZ position based on the current nozzle and filament diameters. prime() Prime the extruder by pushing filament forward. Used after a retraction. addComment() Append a comment to the last command in the queue. render() Render a 3D preview of the planned toolpath. Call this inside a WEBGL p5.js `draw()` loop. pickupTool() Select a tool by index (for multi-tool machines like Jubilee).
